rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §28.026 governs school notice requirements for automatic college admission and financial aid. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district and the governing body of each open-enrollment charter school that provides a high school shall require each high school in the district or provided by the charter school, as applicable, to post appropriate signs in each school counselor's office, in each principal's office, and in each administrative building indicating the substance of Section 51.803 regarding automatic college admission and stating the curriculum requirements for financial aid authorized under Title 3.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education notice statute.
